title: sideritis hirsuta subsp. nivalis
intro: Sideritis hirsuta subsp. nivalis, also known as the alpine ironwort or mountain ironwort, is a plant species belonging to the genus Sideritis and is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and protecting against oxidative stress. Sideritis hirsuta subsp. nivalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to address conditions like bronchitis, fever, and digestive issues.
